title: calochortus invenustus
intro: Calochortus invenustus, also known as the white mariposa lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calochortus invenustus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve using its roots and flowers in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
